name: Linzertorte Fingers
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Unsalted butter; cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely grind unblanched almonds in a food processor or blender.
2. Place the ground almonds in a large bowl.
3. Sift flour, salt, allspice, and powdered sugar into the bowl with the ground almonds.
4. Add lemon peel; mix well until combined.
5. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and add butter and egg yolks.
6. Mix the wet and dry ingredients together to form a soft dough.
7. Knead lightly until smooth. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
8. Preheat the oven to 400°F (205°C).
9. Divide the dough in half.
10. Roll out one piece on a well-floured surface to fit a 13-inch x 9-inch baking pan; place in the pan.
11. Spread raspberry jam over the pastry.
12. Roll out the other half of dough to fit the pan and place it on top of the jam.
13. In a small bowl, lightly beat egg with milk and sugar.
14. Brush the pastry with the glaze and sprinkle with sliced almonds.
15. Bake for 10 minutes at 400°F (205°C), then reduce the temperature to 350°F (175°C).
16. Continue baking for 35 minutes longer or until golden.
17. Cool in the pan. When cooled, cut into 30 pieces.
